title: Rhythm: alphabet song
text: the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog while five wizards jinx my big quartz vow today and tomorrow
tips: Two pangrams back to back — every letter at least once
Don't slow at rare letters — keep the tempo

character_tips.anna: Every letter in flow. Find the rhythm and don't drop it.
character_tips.maxim: Pangram flow = full keyboard rhythm test.
character_tips.klavochka: All letters singing together, my dear 🎶
